allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; content=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\(f'Size: {len\(content\)} chars'\); print\('First 200:', content[:200]\); print\('Last 200:', content[-200:]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; content=sys.stdin.read\(\); import re; matches=re.findall\(r'\(fetch|api|railway|sendinblue|email|backend|RAILWAY|API_URL|endpoint\)', content, re.I\); print\('API references found:', set\(matches\)\)")
